creator: brigadir15@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to mikael.urankar from comment #3)
Thanks for the reference!  I actually viewed ``Issues'' section there before create this PR, but omitted ``Commits'' one, so thanks once again!

I've applied all commits in range 843ded043b82c8d04832d15a30fe95f7cf414262..9ea021d3a9e7bdd3fa0a906c80403d823ce6a767 manually and now I can build the port successfully.

Moreover, r520351[1] fixes this PR.

[1] https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/520351
